description: Rust application depending on uuid@1.6.1 which transitively depends on getrandom@0.2.11. uuid::Uuid::new_v4() internally calls getrandom::getrandom() through crate::rng::bytes(). The analyzer must produce a reachable verdict with a stitched cross-package call path.

findings.human_justification: uuid::Uuid::new_v4() calls crate::rng::bytes() which calls getrandom::getrandom() directly, making getrandom reachable from the app.
